posts.author: GlobalFunding (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have added the Emails & Activities view to my board and would like to set up specific actions/automations based on emails (opened, incoming, etc) but when I click on the automation it states “This integration is not part of your product plan”.
We are currently on the Pro plan. What am I missing here?
